name: Navaneeth
headerTaglineThree: I design and build websites people remember.

projects.title: Ocean Palette | The Art of the Plate

services.title: User Experience Design
services.description: We guide the development of user-centered interfaces, with a particular focus on aligning functional requirements with a frictionless aesthetic experience.

services.title: User Interface Design
services.description: We facilitate the visual translation of brand identities into digital spaces, with a particular focus on consistent design systems and polished high-fidelity mockups.

services.title: Accessibility
services.description: We guide the development of barrier-free digital experiences, with a particular focus on removing usability obstacles and fostering digital equity for every user.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: We assist in the technical execution of digital platforms, with a particular focus on turning complex designs into functional, accessible, and scalable code.

workflow.title: Discovery
workflow.description: Understand you and your business. What's your vision and future goals? What problems are you looking to solve?

workflow.title: Research
workflow.description: Analyze your industry, competitors, and local market to better understand your target audience.

workflow.title: Strategy
workflow.description: Based on the gathered information, I develop a strategic plan to help you reach your goals using the available resources.

workflow.title: Content
workflow.description: Show the right things to your audience. Answer their most important questions so that they can make a buying decision.

workflow.title: Copywriting
workflow.description: Refine your message down to the exact wording. Write in language that your audience will understand.

workflow.title: Design
workflow.description: Strengthen your message through the visual language. Choose the right images, colors and fonts.

workflow.title: Development
workflow.description: Transform the design into a fully functional, responsive website. Add videos, animations, and transitions.

workflow.title: Handover
workflow.description: Walk you through all features and functionality so you can confidently make edits and updates on your own.

workflow.title: Support
workflow.description: Provide post-launch assistance to fix any technical problems and make changes based on real-world usage.

aboutpara:
I am an UX/UI Designer and Web Developer with over two years of experience in the telecom, healthcare, and non-profit sectors. By combining Interaction Design expertise with Full-Stack development, I bridge the gap between complex user needs and high-performance technical solutions.

My expertise spans the entire lifecycle from Figma prototyping and design systems to implementing responsive front-end interfaces. I am dedicated to a user-centered approach that ensures every project is as functional as it is visually compelling.

Whether leading design at OHANA™ or developing resource-sharing platforms at B12Feed, I thrive in agile teams translating stakeholder vision into reality. I focus on creating accessible, impactful experiences that drive both user satisfaction and business growth.

resume.tagline: I'm an UX/UI Product Designer & Web Developer.
resume.description: Creative and detail-oriented designer with 2+ years of experience delivering intuitive digital products across telecom, healthcare, and non-profit sectors. Passionate about translating complex user needs into clean, accessible, and impactful experiences using Figma, React, and AI-powered tools.

experiences.bullets: Designing user-facing workflows and interface components for a community resource-sharing platform. Created user journey documentation and MVP-to-Phase-2 product roadmaps to support long-term sustainability. Collaborated with developers to ensure accurate design implementation throughout the software development lifecycle.

Redesigned and developed key website pages to deliver a visually cohesive experience aligned with brand identity. Built fully responsive, mobile-first layouts and created high-fidelity prototypes in Figma to communicate intent to stakeholders. Maintained organized design documentation and standardized design system components to ensure consistency.

Designed and launched the company's main website applying user-centered design principles to enhance accessibility. Conducted user research and usability testing, translating findings into actionable design iterations. Developed and maintained UI style guides and design documentation.

education.universityPara: Currently pursuing Web Development at Humber Polytechnic (CGPA: 3.5) following a Graduate Certificate in Interactive Media Management - Interaction Design from Conestoga College. Background includes a Bachelor of Computer Science & Engineering with a strong foundation in programming and systems design.
